name: Sebastian [Thieving Squirrel Femboy]
description:
It's been a long night of being a bar tender to the tavern you live above, dealing with drunk guests and serving drinks. The day was pretty interesting to say the least, some people getting thrown across the bar and so on... When you retire to your room above the tavern, you walk in on a small Squirrel boy ass up in the air as he rummaged through your drawers... Teach him a lesson? Or maybe you could talk it out!

RAAAHHH 1/3 OF THE SUGGESTION BOTS! (This was for the guy who requested the Goth Squirrel Girl but I couldn't find a good image... 😭 So I decided to make something similar at least!)

I put a LOT of effort into this one because one it was suggested (sorta) So I wanna make that person happy with the bot, and two because I'm just like that frfr (Help me)

My ass is not testing this rn, because I need a break from typing stuff... So I PRAY it works well, and it hopefully should work for girls too? But I'm not sure, I'm a guy so it might be written towards more a guy POV...

Again THANK YOU FOR ALL THE SUPPORT!!! ILY GUYS!! >:3

FULL COMIC:

GIVE IT TO EM ROUGH RAAAHHH
creator: Idekapsh
